message:
feat(core): support INSERT OR REPLACE and INSERT OR IGNORE conflict handling (bd-3j3h)

Route INSERT with or_conflict through a fallback path that evaluates
VALUES expressions, resolves the INTEGER PRIMARY KEY rowid, and applies
conflict resolution directly on the in-memory database: REPLACE uses
upsert semantics, IGNORE skips conflicting rows, and ABORT/FAIL/ROLLBACK
raise UniqueViolation. Also makes MemTable::alloc_rowid and find_by_rowid
public for use by the conflict handler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
